summary: This standard extends [ERC-20](./eip-20.md) to enable efficient token forking through checkpoint-based balance tracking. A forkable ERC-20 token records balance snapshots at each state change. A forked ERC-20 token inherits all balances from a specific checkpoint in the source token, allowing instant, gas-free distribution to holders without airdrops or claiming mechanisms.
title: Forkable ERC-20 Token
